title: Melrose climbs after expanding GE Aerospace partnership
text: Melrose Industries PLC (LSE:MRO, OTC:MLSPF)' share price jumped 4.1% after announcing its GKN Aerospace Engines business has signed a major new agreement with GE Aerospace, the global aerospace engines market leader. The two firms have expanded their long-term partnership with a new agreement that expands the risk and revenue sharing partnership participation on the GEnx programme, the fastest-selling high-thrust engine.
